arts.ttl: Bayern Munich and Chelsea interested in Atletico Madrid midfielder Pablo Barrios
arts.sum: Bild reports that Bayern Munich and Chelsea are both interested in Atletico Madrid midfield Pablo Barrios, but he is unlikely to come cheap. Bayern are in the process of shaking up…

arts.ttl: Guido Della Rovere channels his inner “chill guy” when trotting out for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Many people feel a lot of pressure at that exact moment, but for me it’s the other way around,” Della Rovere said (as captured by Bayern’s official website ). “I go to an international school in Neuperlach and had to find my way around there at first.

arts.ttl: Kompany gives team update ahead of Leverkusen showdown
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany has given an update on his Bayern Munich squad ahead of Saturday's clash with Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Arne Engels vents '50/50' Celtic penalty frustration as he reveals what he REALLY thought about Bayern spot kick denial
arts.sum: The Hoops ace was blown away by the Parkhead wall of noise and he is delighted UEFA didn't slap a ban on Bayern return

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Bayern Munich (Bundesliga)
arts.sum: After taking down Celtic FC in the Champions League midweek, Bayern Munich will travel to Bayer Leverkusen for the biggest match of the Bundesliga season to date. A look at the rosters and injuries for Bayer Leverkusen and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: The subtle Celtic high-wire act that nearly caught Bayern cold as Hoops star warns foes 'it's game ON' in Munich
arts.sum: The Hoops paid the price for letting Harry Kane pop out of nowhere at Parkhead and they can't afford a repeat at the Allianz Arena

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich prez keeps it more politically correct with Florian Wirtz transfer; FC Barcelona likely to extend Robert Lewandowski, but eyes Benjamin Šeško as successor; Thomas Müller still unsure on future; and MORE!
arts.sum: After taking down Celtic FC in the Champions League midweek, Bayern Munich will travel to Bayer Leverkusen for the biggest match of the Bundesliga season to date. Bayer Leverkusen absolutely, positively needs a win in this match and seems ready to throw everything — including the kitchen sink — at Bayern Munich in hopes of capturing three points and making the Bundesliga title race a true fight once again.

arts.ttl: Hiroki Itō hopes for a new beginning at Bayern Munich following his injury comeback in UCL match against Celtic
arts.sum: Hiroki Itō’s journey at Bayern Munich so far has been horribly disappointing, though to no fault of the Japanese defender. Hopefully, the worst is finally behind Itō and he can start to, at long last, show his qualities in a Bayern shirt.

arts.ttl: Jan-Christian Dreesen celebrates second Bayern Munich UCL away win since 2023 and Hiroki Itō’s return
arts.sum: But this was a special day because, if we don’t count the Shakhtar game that wasn’t really an away game, this was the first away win in the Champions League since 12 December 2023 against Manchester United,” Dreesen explained in the post match banquet, via @iMiaSanMia . Bayern Munich ’s away record this season has been notoriously poor, but the Bavarians did take a step towards rectifying it with a 1-2 away win at Celtic.

arts.ttl: How Kompany is 'paving way' for black coaches at Bayern
arts.sum: Troy Townsend says Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany is paving the way for black managers in an exploration of the young coach's background.
